description.value:
Trigger The Path River Peeler enters the cave

Effect A gust of ice-cold wind from the Netherworld blasts from the rift in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15]. Creatures in the area take @Damage[2d4[cold]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:20|basic|options:area-effect] save). The hazard then rolls initiative.

details.description: A chill wind blows from a fissure in the cavern wall.
details.disable: @Check[arcana|dc:18], @Check[nature|dc:18], @Check[occultism|dc:18], or @Check[religion|dc:18] (trained) to seal the rift, three successes total; or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Dispel Magic] (3rd rank; counteract DC 17)
details.reset: The rift reopens after [[/gmr 2d10 #Years to reopen]] years. Killing the Path River Peeler permanently seals the rift.
details.routine:
(2 actions) The hazard uses its first action to repeat its Wind from the Netherworld reaction. If any patch of barrow claw remains, one of the patches chosen by the GM releases a cloud of spores. The spores fill the barrow claw's space and last until the beginning of the hazard's next turn. Creatures within the spores become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Concealed], and all creature outside the spores become concealed to creatures within it.

A creature that enters the spores or starts their turn in the area takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,cold]] damage until they brush off the spores as an Interact action.
